context_for_next_testing_agent: ResultCard feature completely removed. Key verifications: (1) All /api/result-cards/* endpoints return 404, (2) ResultCardSection component does not exist on any appointment detail page, (3) /card/:cardId route removed from frontend router, (4) FinancialResultSection remains visible on past evaluated appointments as the sole source of result information, (5) All existing features (engagement summary, financial breakdown, check-in, calendar buttons, dispute badges) continue to work. Test appointments used: 884a22e1 (organizer view), e823473a (participant view), d839b4a8 (past evaluated).
